included: web design command adapter spec for accounts_onboard
live design server ui_action allowlist entry for onboard_account
minimal Add Account modal entry point
targeted adapter, live server, and static UI tests

canonical_boundaries.post_action_truth: UI action result is an owner command result summary; accounts screen refreshes canonical accounts readonly packet after action.
canonical_boundaries.reserve_first_rule: reserve placement is shown as success only when final_outcome is admitted, reserve_first_enforced is true, pool_after_onboarding is reserve, active_routing_changed is false, selected_backend_id is present, and the top-level command result is ok.

outcome_mapping.unknown_outcome_rule: missing, non-object, or unadmitted onboarding_result is not success
outcome_mapping.selected_backend_rule: selected_backend_id is exposed only for admitted success with reserve-first proof

ui_contract.entry_point: Add Account opens a minimal bounded modal on Accounts screen
ui_contract.modal_claim: owner command request only; no file scan, no credentials upload, no active routing proof
ui_contract.availability: Add Account participates in onboard-action availability and busy-state wiring
ui_contract.confirmation: onboard_account uses existing confirmation metadata; global confirmation redesign is deferred
ui_contract.refresh: post_action_refresh_required triggers live accounts readonly refresh on Accounts screen

coverage_added: adapter allowlist exact argv metadata for accounts_onboard
adapter rejects structured browser args for accounts_onboard
server exact command execution without browser args
server rejects raw adapter action and browser auth/path/credentials/backend fields
server maps reserve-first owner packet to success only with proof
server maps no-new-auth and ambiguous identity to needs_user_action
server maps failed proof steps and top-level command errors to command_error
server maps missing onboarding_result to unknown_outcome
static UI contains modal entry point and no raw accounts onboard command
static UI contains no file picker, path field, credentials field, or auto-promotion copy

known_followups.item: full Add Account visual parity with source design package is not attempted
known_followups.disposition: defer to UI_WEB_VISUAL_STABILIZATION_PASS or desktop renderer admission

known_followups.item: manual auth file selection is unsupported in browser UI
known_followups.disposition: defer until a bounded server-owned command contract exists

known_followups.item: pre-existing dirty worktree tail includes runtime and external lab files outside this contour
known_followups.disposition: exclude from this contour commit and adjudicate under WORKTREE_TAIL_ADJUDICATION
